Package com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml

Class ColumnType

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml.ColumnType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ColumnType extends Object implements Serializable

Java class for columnType complex type.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class. 

 <complexType name="columnType">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="wx" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="id" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="sort" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}sortKindType"/>
         <element name="align" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}alignType"/>
         <element name="locked" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="multiLine" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="hidden" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="fieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="multivalue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="dbFieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="displayName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="fieldType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
